name: backend
description: Opinionated modular Express + TypeScript backend starter with Sequelize, Zod, JWT auth, RBAC, caching, and CRUD generation.

scripts.build: tsc && tsc-alias && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/database/seeders', { recursive: true }); fs.writeFileSync('dist/database/seeders/package.json', JSON.stringify({ type: 'commonjs' }))"
scripts.db:migrate: npm run build && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate
scripts.db:migrate:undo: npm run build && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo
scripts.db:seed: npm run build && npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all
scripts.db:seed:undo: npm run build && npx sequelize-cli db:seed:undo:all
